---
id: get-cashflows-for-deal
title: "List cashflows for a deal"
description: "Returns the cashflow schedule for a deal, including each cashflow's id, type, status, payment date, and amount. The id is required to fix a PROJECTED FLOAT_COUPON via POST /api/v1/cashflows/{id}/fix."
sidebar_label: "List cashflows for a deal"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List cashflows for a deal"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/cashflows/deal/{dealId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the cashflow schedule for a deal, including each cashflow's id, type, status, payment date, and amount. The id is required to fix a PROJECTED FLOAT_COUPON via POST /api/v1/cashflows/\{id\}/fix.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>

</RequestSchema>
